name: community-ops-kit
description: Evidence-based community operations workflows with reusable SOPs, safe AI and platform handoffs, execution verification, and reporting loops.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable workflows for evidence-based community operations
interface.longDescription: Turn community evidence into routed actions, reusable SOPs, owner-reviewed AI and platform handoffs, verified execution records, and daily or weekly decisions.
defaultPrompt: Turn these community notes into a routed operating workflow with evidence, roles, approval gates, and verification.
Convert this repeated community task into an SOP another operator or agent can execute safely.
Review this activity from preparation through verified execution and decide the next action.
